spec: The whole projection pipeline composed on a real WebGPU device: an animated producer → run-ahead → raster-ingest → kappa-stream → projector → holo-webgpu-lens, painting to the metal. The GPU composite is pixel-identical to the produced frame; the determinism fence holds; full-stack throughput measured.
authority: Chromium (Playwright) real WebGPU (D3D12/Vulkan/Metal) · the served substrate modules · holospaces Laws L1/L3/L5
